chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3615 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ خَيْرَ فِيمَنْ لاَ يُحِبُّ جَمْعَ اَلْمَالِ مِنْ حَلاَلٍ فَيَكُفَّ بِهِ وَجْهَهُ وَ يَقْضِيَ بِهِ دَيْنَهُ وَ يَصِلَ بِهِ رَحِمَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3615 - Imam (as) said: "There is no good in one who does not desire to earn wealth through lawful means, so that he may protect his dignity, pay off his debts, and maintain ties of kinship."
